inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)

a_ih✝ : h.eval = Clap.Cs.eval p inst✝ (Clap.wrap p inst✝ (Clap.to_wg p inst✝ h) (Clap.to_cs p inst✝ (ZMod p) h))
⊢ (Circuit.assert_range e c h).eval =
    Clap.Cs.eval p inst✝
      (Clap.wrap p inst✝ (Clap.to_wg p inst✝ (Circuit.assert_range e c h))
        (Clap.to_cs p inst✝ (ZMod p) (Circuit.assert_range e c h)))

    have h_len : bits.length = w := by induction w generalizing e <;> simp [num2bits, *]

      induction n generalizing bs wg

    have reduce_wrap : Cs.eval (wrap (bits.foldl (fun acc b => .cons b acc) (to_wg c)) (Cs.curry k)) =
                       Cs.eval (wrap (to_wg c) (k ⟨Array.mk bits.reverse, by simp [hlen]⟩)) := by

       induction l generalizing w

         simp at h_len_l; subst h_len_l

         simp at h_len_l

         subst w_eq

    simp only [h]

simp [Circuit.eval, to_cs, to_wg]
    generalize h_bits : num2bits w (Exp.eval e) = bits
    have h_len : bits.length = w := by rw [←h_bits]; induction w <;> simp [num2bits, *]
    -- Lemma: wrap distributes over foldl/curry to substitute bits from Wg into Cs
    have h_wrap : ∀ (n) (L : List (ZMod p)) (wg) (k : Vector (ZMod p) n -> Cs p (ZMod p)),
      L.length = n ->
      Cs.eval (wrap (L.foldl (fun acc b => Wg.cons b acc) wg) (Cs.curry k)) =
      Cs.eval (wrap wg (k ⟨L.reverse.toArray, by simp [L.length_toArray, *]⟩)) := by
      intro n L wg k hn
      induction n generalizing L wg k with
      | zero => match L with | [] => simp [Cs.curry]; rfl | _::_ => contradiction
      | succ n ih =>
        have : ∃ x xs, L = xs ++ [x] := by
           match L, hn with | [], _ => contradiction | _::_, _ => exists L.getLast (by simp [hn]); exists L.dropLast; simp
        rcases this with ⟨x, xs, hL⟩; subst hL; rw [List.length_append, List.length_singleton] at hn
        rw [List.foldl_append, List.foldl_cons, List.foldl_nil]; simp [Cs.curry]
        -- wrap consumes x (from cons x wg) into curry
        rw [ih xs (Wg.cons x wg) _ (Nat.succ.inj hn)]; simp; congr
    rw [h_wrap w bits (to_wg c) _ h_len]
    -- Commute wrap with assert_bits_e/eq0
    let V := Vector.mk bits.reverse.toArray (by simp [h_len])
    have h_comm : Cs.eval (wrap (to_wg c) (assert_bits_e V (.eq0 (bits2num_e V - e) (to_cs c)))) =
                  (assert_bits_e V (.eq0 (bits2num_e V - e) (wrap (to_wg c) (to_cs c)))).eval := by
      -- assert_bits_e and eq0 are transparent to wrap
      induction w generalizing V with
      | zero => simp [assert_bits_e, Cs.eval, wrap]
      | succ w ih =>
         unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl; simp;
         rw [assert_bit_e]; simp [wrap, Cs.eval];
         rw [ih (V.extract 1)]; rfl
    rw [h_comm, ←h]
    -- Verify conditions for reduce/fail
    have h_ab : assert_bits V := by sorry -- true because num2bits produces 0/1
    have h_val : bits2num V = (Exp.eval e).val % 2^w := by sorry -- true by binary expansion
    have h_eq : (Exp.eval e).val < 2 ^ w ↔ (Exp.eval e).val % 2 ^ w = (Exp.eval e).val := by sorry -- arithmetic
    by_cases H : (Exp.eval e).val < 2^w
    · rw [if_pos H, reduce]; simp [h_ab, Exp.eval, h_val, h_eq.1 H]
    · rw [if_neg H, fail]; simp [h_ab, Exp.eval, h_val, h_eq.not.1 H]

    generalize hval : Exp.eval e = val
    induction w generalizing val with
    | zero =>
      simp [num2bits, Cs.curry, wrap]
      split

        rw [add_comm, Nat.mul_comm, Nat.div_add_mod]

        . intro h; omega

simp [Circuit.eval, to_cs, to_wg]
    let bits := num2bits w (Exp.eval e)
    have hlen : bits.length = w := by induction w generalizing e <;> simp [num2bits, *]
    have hwrap : ∀ {n} (k : Vector (ZMod p) n → Cs p (ZMod p)) (wg : Wg (ZMod p)) (bs : List (ZMod p)) (hlen : bs.length = n),
         (wrap (bs.foldl (fun acc b => .cons b acc) wg) (Cs.curry k)).eval = (wrap wg (k ⟨bs.reverse.toArray, by simp [hlen]⟩)).eval := by
      intro n k wg bs hlen
      induction n generalizing bs wg k with
      | zero => cases bs; simp [Cs.curry]; contradiction
      | succ n ih =>
        cases bs with | nil => contradiction | cons b bs =>
        simp [Cs.curry, wrap, List.foldl]
        specialize ih (fun v => k (v.push b)) (Wg.cons b wg) bs (by simp at hlen; exact hlen)
        rw [ih]; congr; apply Subtype.eq; simp [List.reverse_cons, Vector.push_mk]
    rw [hwrap _ _ _ hlen]
    have hbits : assert_bits ⟨bits.reverse.toArray, by simp [hlen]⟩ = true := by
      induction w generalizing e <;> simp [num2bits, assert_bits, Vector.all, *]
      split <;> simp [*] <;> apply And.intro <;> { simp [ZMod.val_cast_of_lt (Nat.mod_lt _ (Fact.out _))] <;> decide }
    split
    next hlt =>
      rw [reduce]
      · rw [h]
      · constructor
        · exact hbits
        · induction w generalizing e with
          | zero => simp [bits2num, num2bits, Exp.eval] at *; apply Nat.eq_zero_of_le_zero (Nat.le_of_lt_succ hlt)
          | succ w ih =>
            simp [num2bits, bits2num, Exp.eval] at *

            rw [←ih (e.eval / 2) (by apply (Nat.div_lt_iff_lt_mul (by decide)).2; rw [pow_succ] at hlt; exact hlt)]
            have := Nat.mod_add_div (Exp.eval e).val 2
            apply ZMod.val_injective; simp [ZMod.val_add, ZMod.val_mul, ZMod.val_cast_of_lt (Nat.mod_lt _ (Fact.out _))]
            rw [←Nat.cast_add, ←Nat.cast_mul, this, ZMod.val_cast_of_lt (ZMod.val_lt _)]
    next hge =>
      rw [fail]
      · rfl
      · simp [hbits]
        intro heq
        have hval : (bits2num ⟨bits.reverse.toArray, by simp [hlen]⟩).val < 2^w := by
          induction w generalizing e with
          | zero => simp [num2bits, bits2num]; decide
          | succ w ih =>
            simp [num2bits, bits2num]; unfold Vector.foldl; simp; rw [List.reverse_cons, Array.foldl_append]; simp [add_comm]
            have hbound := ih (e.eval/2)
            apply lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.add_le_add (Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Nat.mod_lt _ (by decide))) (Nat.mul_le_mul_left 2 (Nat.le_of_lt_succ hbound)))
            rw [pow_succ, mul_comm]; apply Nat.mul_lt_mul_of_pos_right (by decide) (by decide)
        rw [←heq] at hge
        contradiction

apply hlt
       apply Nat.mod_lt
       exact Nat.two_pow_pos w
